title: Intrepid (luxury cruiser)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Intrepid}} {{Image}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Intrepid'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Cruiser/Legends|Cruiser]]{{CSWECite|II|109|''Intrepid'' (1)}} |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] **[[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers=[[Jace Dallin]][[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Do you now know where you are and who you are with, Aayla Secura?''"
"''Returning to Coruscant aboard the ''Intrepid''.|Plo Koon and Aayla Secura|}} The '''''Intrepid''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] luxury [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that belonged to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the final [[Standard decade|decades]] of the Republic. ==History== In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]],[[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] takes place thirty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], thirty years after [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]. the ''Intrepid'' carried Jedi Councilors [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], and [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]], and Tholme's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], capital [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the Galactic Republic,[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]] from the planet[[Star Wars (1998) 32|''Star Wars'' (1998) 32]] [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]].[[Star Wars (1998) 35|''Star Wars'' (1998) 35]] On the journey, Koon used his [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathy]] to help the amnesiac Secura recover her lost memory, and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], joined by ''Intrepid'' crewmember [[Jace Dallin]], told her the story of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], of which they all were veterans. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1998) 37|''Star Wars'' (1998) 37]] *[[Star Wars (1998) 38|''Star Wars'' (1998) 38]] *[[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]] ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}}
